name: aunion-ai
description: Aunion AI - Korean Lecture Real-time Translation
author: Aunion Team

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "conda run --no-capture-output -n aunion python backend/run.py" "wait-on http://localhost:8000/health && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,frontend,electron -c blue,green,magenta "conda run --no-capture-output -n aunion python backend/run.py" "wait-on http://localhost:8000/health && npm run dev --prefix frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build --prefix frontend && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
